heading: Private support for civil rights history project
label: 80s–2 Private support for civil rights history project

children.heading: Encouraging solicitation and acceptance of donations
children.label: a Encouraging solicitation and acceptance of donations
children.text: The Librarian of Congress and the Secretary are encouraged to solicit and accept donations of funds and in-kind contributions to support activities under .section 80s–1 of this title

children.heading: Dedication of funds provided to Library of Congress
children.label: b Dedication of funds provided to Library of Congress

children.text: any funds donated to the Librarian of Congress to support the activities of the Librarian under shall be deposited entirely into an account established for such purpose;section 80s–1 of this title
the funds contained in such account shall be used solely to support such activities; and
the Librarian of Congress may not deposit into such account any funds donated to the Librarian which are not donated for the exclusive purpose of supporting such activities.
